experiment.name: quicktest_system_prompt
experiment.description: Quick E2E test: concise vs verbose system prompt with Haiku. No tools, 2 turns max, 2 simple tasks.

diff.description: no system prompt vs 'be very brief' system prompt

agent_b.name: brief_system_prompt
agent_b.system_prompt: Reply in one sentence only. Be extremely concise.

tasks: What is the capital of France?
